location_precision.why: Every one of the six findings carries a usable file:line (e.g. 'src/sync.py:14', 'src/report.py:11').

interaction_synthesis.why: Each finding is described in isolation with no cross-defect compound failure mechanism identified (the only multi-effect note, report.py:7's unclosed handle from an exception, is contained within a single finding, not an interaction between separate defects).

causal_clarity.why: Every finding states the failure mechanism, e.g. 'truncates instead of rounding up, so the final partial page is never fetched' and 'Mutable default argument seen=[] is shared across calls, so a later sync_users invocation silently skips every user ID.'

interaction_synthesis.why: Each finding is treated independently; no cross-defect compound failure mode (e.g. the `except Exception: pass` swallowing the SQL-injection or None-email crash) is described, only within-finding consequences.

causal_clarity.why: Every finding states the mechanism, e.g. `range(total_count // PAGE_SIZE)` truncates instead of rounding up so the final partial page is never fetched, and `seen=[]` is shared across calls silently skipping already-processed IDs.
